Underhive Scavenging.result: Worthless junk. Empty ration tins, rusted cogs, and stained rags.
A handful of local guild tokens, corroded but spendable (1d5 value).
Half-empty flask of low-grade, potentially blinding amasec.
A handful of stubber or autogun rounds (1d10 ammo).
A crude, functional melee weapon (club, rusty knife, length of heavy chain).
A barely functional piece of tech (e.g., a glitchy lumen-globe or cracked auspex).
Valuable salvage. An intact medipattern autosyringe or a barely-used charge pack.

Lower Hive Theft.result: A handful of Thrones (2d10 value) lifted from a distracted merchant.
A forged ident-chip or travel writ, poorly made but passable to a bored watchman.
A fresh ration pack. Actually contains real protein, not corpse-starch.
A shiny bauble or minor jewelry (10d10 Throne value).
A datapad containing mundane mercantile logs or low-level guild secrets.
A concealed weapon, like a spring-loaded stiletto or a compact derringer.
A vial of 'obscura' or other illicit narcotics.

Gang Loot.result: A handful of battered stub-rounds or shotgun shells (2d10 ammo).
A heavy, bloodstained melee weapon (chainsword, shock maul, or heavy mono-cleaver).
A pouch of 'Spook' (a dangerous psychic stimulant).
A well-maintained autogun, shotgun, or stub-revolver.
Gang colors or tattoos taken as trophies, very dangerous to possess.
A stash of extracted gold teeth or crude rings (3d10 Throne value).
A powerful, possibly customized weapon, like a bolt pistol or a plas-pistol on its last leg.
